channel.title: VA on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in VA on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 287(g) JEM: Pittsylvania County Sheriff’s Office (VA)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Pittsylvania County Sheriff’s Office.

Model: JEM Signed: June 11, 2025 County: Pittsylvania County State: VA FIPS: 51143

item.title: ACCENTURE FEDERAL SERVICES LLC — ICE ALEXANDRIA CITY, VA $41,441,112
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: ACCENTURE FEDERAL SERVICES LLC Award ID: HSCETC16F00019 Amount: $41,441,112.16 Description: IGF::CL,CT::IGF NEW CONTRACT FOR SOC/CSIRC SUPPORT SERVICES IN THE AMOUNT OF $8,024,891.00. PREVIOUS CONTRACT #HSCETE-14-A-00001 / HSCETE-15-J-00152; AMB#12493 16-IAD00001,2,5-7,36,53,5 ALT JEFFREY.HOWARD@ICE.DHS.GOV 202-732-2422 Period: 2016-09-22 to 2021-10-27 Location: ALEXANDRIA CITY, VA (FIPS: )

item.description:

item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: CACI NSS, LLC Award ID: 70CMSD20FR0000219 Amount: $106,045,477.18 Description: HSI DATA AND ANALYTICAL SUPPORT SERVICES Period: 2020-09-28 to 2026-03-27 Location: FAIRFAX, VA (FIPS: 51600)

item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: DELOITTE CONSULTING LLP Award ID: 70CDCR20FR0000070 Amount: $69,678,847.05 Description: LAW ENFORCEMENT SYSTEMS AND ANALYSIS FOR ERO Period: 2020-12-22 to 2026-05-15 Location: ARLINGTON, VA (FIPS: 51013)

item.title: GARDAWORLD FEDERAL SERVICES LLC — ICE ARLINGTON, VA $313,357,612
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: GARDAWORLD FEDERAL SERVICES LLC Award ID: 70CDCR26FR0000043 Amount: $313,357,612.46 Description: THIS TASK ORDER IS TO PROCURE THE RENOVATION OF EXISTING, ICE-OWNED PERMANENT STRUCTURE IN SUPRISE, AZ TO SERVE AS A PROCESSING AND DETENTION FACILITY AND PROVIDE ALL NECESSARY WRAPAROUND SERVICES FOR OPERATION OF THE FACILITY. Period: 2026-03-06 to 2027-03-05 Location: ARLINGTON, VA (FIPS: 51013)

item.description:

item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: TECHOP SOLUTIONS INTERNATIONAL, INC. Award ID: 70CMSD26FR0000002 Amount: $7,103,923.20 Description: THIS AWARD PROVIDES ICE HOMELAND SECURITY INVESTIGATIONS OFFICE OF INTELLIGENCE WITH TIP LINE CALL CENTER SUPPORT SERVICES IN SUPPORT OF ONGOING LAW ENFORCEMENT INVESTIGATIONS. Period: 2026-01-05 to 2027-01-04 Location: STAFFORD, VA (FIPS: 51179)
